_comment: Central tuning knobs for pipeline behavior. Keep values conservative first, then tune incrementally.

toc_generation._comment: TOC = Table of Contents generation settings.

iteration_loop._comment: Controls for section-by-section concept and edge discovery loop.
iteration_loop._comment_iteration_count: 0 means parse all TOC sections; set >0 to cap section-loop iterations.
iteration_loop._comment_concept_scope: Cap per-section concept extraction and keep node inventory focused on high-level topics.
